title: Analysis code for: A single-nucleus RNA sequencing dataset of the mouse hippocampus after controlled cortical impact with astrocyte-specific TGF-betaRI knockout
description: Companion analysis code for the Scientific Data Data Descriptor by Sheng et al. Reproduces all quality-control, integration, annotation, and technical-validation figures and tables. Companion to GEO dataset GSE333879.
